chunk.text: Minor Metals Monthly No.154 Website: www.antaike.com 2 Highlight The first batch of export quota for antimony in 2013 issued MOFCOM released the first batch of export quota for antimony in 2013 recently. According to which, the first batch quota accounted for 60% of yearly total. Minor Metals Monthly No.154 Website: www.antaike.com 3 Antimony Market Overview for 2012 Price Review 2012 The antimony price on Chinese market was in downward trend in 2012 mainly due to the soft demand. The price has stabilized by the timing of writing. The price of 2# antimony ingot collected by Antaike shows: the high was seen in mid February, which was RMB81,000-83,000/t, the low was seen in December, which was RMB67,000-68,000/. However, the price was up by 165%, compared to the low of RMB25,000-26,000/t post-crisis. The average price of the ingot was RMB73,500/t, down by 21% yoy. Antimony yearly average price in 2000-2012 Antaike quotation in Jul. 2011-Dec. 2012 Minor Metals Monthly No.154 Website: www.antaike.com 4 Supply Domestic production slightly down Antaike estimates the domestic production of antimony-in-concentrate is about 81kt, observing an obvious decrease compared to the previous year. The import of antimony-in-concentrate is around 41kt, creating a historical high. The production of antimony products (metal content) is 122kt, down by 4.7% yoy.

ued to be tight. In Q3, the private smelters in Lengshuijiang did not re-start. Only a limited number of big-scale smelters were in normal operation. In Q4, some smelters resumed production gradually, boosted the government’s reserve. The operation rate of private smelters in Hunan was 40% in December. Domestic antimony products output (metal content) in 2000-2012 Production in Jan.-Nov. 2012 The statistics from China Nonferrous Metals Industry Association (CNIA) shows the production of antimony-in-concentrate and antimony products (metal content) in the first 11 months was 110.3kt and 215.5kt up by up by 8.49% and 9.94% yoy, respectively. In November alone, the production of antimony-in-concentrate and antimony products was

f antimony-in-concentrate is around 41kt, creating a historical high. The production of antimony products (metal content) is 122kt, down by 4.7% yoy. Considering the tightness of antimony concentrate will continue in the future, and the slow recovering pace of world economy, the domestic production of antimony products will not grow fast, which might be around 128kt in 2013, increasing by 4.9% yoy. In half 1, the supply of antimony was tight due to the following factors: first, seasonal reason caused reduced production of antimony concentrate, second, producers in Lengshuijiang in Hunan Province were forced to suspend production when the illegal export of antimony ingot to Vietnam was cracked down. In the three months starting from May, the majority of smelters in the region were in suspension. Third, the smelters in Guangxi Autonomous Region, one of the major production regions in China, did not resume production due to the environmental protection issues. In half 2, the supply continued to be tight. In Q3, the private smelters in Lengshuijiang did not re-start. Only a limited number of big-scale smelters were in normal operation.

Minor Metals Monthly No.154 Website: www.antaike.com 6 Burma 475,240 810,382 7,315,303 8,648,682 Australia 1,474,870 10,306,809 6,967,964 50,957,917 Canada 580,227 2,757,885 6,013,044 28,502,055 Thailand 311,966 498,373 6,004,048 7,002,745 Laos 0 0 1,464,210 1,214,230 Mexico 0 0 1,373,867 356,291 Kazakhsta n 0 0 1,261,127 3,415,574 Others 257,755 537,990 3,285,144 6,119,330 Export China Customs statistics show China exported 3,245t antimony products in November, down by 22.28% mom; the accumulative export in the first eleven months was 44,600t, up by 1.8% yoy. The export of antimony oxide in November alone was 2,925t, down by 20.6%, it was mainly exported to USA, Taiwan and Japan, accounting for 82% of the total export volume. The accumulative export was 36,300t in Jan.-Nov., down by 5.67% yoy. The major destinations are USA, Hong Kong, Taiwan and Japan. The export of unwrought antimony in November was 316t, down by 29.78% mom, it was mainly exported to Holland, USA, Hong Kong and Japan, accounting for 98% of the total volume. The export in Jan.-Nov. was about 8,114t, up by 73.08% yoy.

ly exported to Holland, USA, Hong Kong and Japan, accounting for 98% of the total volume. The export in Jan.-Nov. was about 8,114t, up by 73.08% yoy. Based on the export volume in the first eleven months, we estimate the total export of antimony products (metal content) was around 41,500t, similar with that in 2011. However, the traditional export-oriented product – antimony oxide saw decrease whist the export of unwrought antimony saw increase due to the more strict management on illegal export, which, partly, offset the decrease in antimony oxide. There are much uncertainties in global economy. It will take time for the antimony demand to recover. The export of antimony products will be negatively affected. So Antaike estimates the export is not likely to experience big increase next year. The volume will about about 44,000t (metal content), slightly up by 6% yoy. Chinese antimony products export in 2000-2012

and became very sensitive. Down-stream plants tried to delay purchase time, hoping to see low price. Therefore, the market became slower and slower. Seen from the recent down-stream consumption survey for antimony recently, down-stream industries include modified plastic, glass, polyester and so on saw low operation rate affected by weak economy, and the demand for antimony oxide was directly influenced. From substitution of antimony oxide flame retardant field applied in the related product tracking situation, in addition to the use of borate, silicon and magnesium salts, water talc and other writers agonist, and some have not yet been released composition of composite products. Despite the current alternatives remain in the partial substitution of antimony oxide, the quantity trended to be enlarged. Antaike estimates that the substitution ratio would be around 30%, and some individual application replacement ratio may reach 50%. The major consumption fields conclude flame-retardant, battery alloy, catalyzer and glass cleaning agent, etc.. Among which, the application in flame-retardant accounted for the largest ratio.

Minor Metals Monthly No.154 Website: www.antaike.com 8 Others 5,300 87,184 1,262,233 15,860,267 Down-stream consumption remains weak The down-stream demand of antimony kept weak in 2012 and the consumption suffered serious shrinking. The major reasons include: first, affected by weak global economy, the operation rate of down-stream producers was commonly low, and transaction volume of antimony products was maintained at low level; secondly, replacement products application got further promotion, which caused domestic antimony oxide usage volume to decrease in flame-retardant field; thirdly, purchase way of down-streaming plants kept cautious, and most consumers and terminal users adopted strategy of buying products for instant demand to reduce stock as much as possible. Due to slow operation of global economy, both the domestic and overseas market operated slowly and became very sensitive. Down-stream plants tried to delay purchase time, hoping to see low price. Therefore, the market became slower and slower.

-retardant, battery alloy, catalyzer and glass cleaning agent, etc.. Among which, the application in flame-retardant accounted for the largest ratio. In accordance with related statistics supplied by China Flame-retardant Society, antimony related products in brominated flame retardants in 2012 were reduced compared with that in 2011. It is analyzed from related enterprises; the decrease of consumption is mainly affected by modified plastic and replacement products, which resulted in 20% decrease in antimony oxide consumption. Antimony consumption in catalyst and battery fields saw slightly growth compared with that in 2011, but suffered decrease in glass cleaning agent, especially in PV glass. Seen form the whole antimony consumption, the total antimony consumption in 2012 dropped. It is estimated the domestic consumption of antimony in 2012 was 60kt, down by 7.7% y-o-y.

Minor Metals Monthly No.154 Website: www.antaike.com 9 The future antimony products consumption growth will concentrate in domestic market, and the major growth fields will be flame-retardant and PV industry. With the raise of safety consciousness of fire-prevention, the consumption of flame-retardant will keep growth trend. However, the consumption in flame-retardant field remained in threat from replacement products. Therefore, it is predicted that antimony consumption in flame-retardant application field will difficult to see large growth. China government confirmed policies for promoting PV industry healthy development. It is predicted that PV industry has decent future and it is expected to become the major growth consumption field of antimony. Antaike forecasts that the domestic antimony consumption in 2013 will tenderly grow to 65kt. Domestic supply and demand balance Although antimony supply fell in 2012, the whole antimony market remained in oversupply when facing large decrease of down-stream demand. In accordance with the statistics released in Jan.-Nov.

hole antimony market remained in oversupply when facing large decrease of down-stream demand. In accordance with the statistics released in Jan.-Nov. and Antaike’s survey statistics, it is forecasted that the domestic antimony products output (antimony content) was 122kt, and the imported antimony products (metal content) was 1.8kt, and the domestic consumption and export was 101.5kt. Therefore, it is deduced that the surplus in 2012 is about 22.3kt. Minor Metals Monthly No.154 Website: www.antaike.com 10 Export 7.41 6.69 5.36 5.49 3.6 5.1 4.1 4.15 4.4 Balance -0.78 -0.95 0.17 -0.48 1.31 -0.23 2.4 2.23 2.1 Source: Antaike “E” means expected volume Outlook In 2013, it is commonly predicted that the world economy growth will be faster than that in 2012, despite in low speed. The global economy development will face some uncertain and unfavorable factors. Chinese steady growth policy and structure adjustment strategy will go on to be implemented in 2012, which will be favorably to boost Chinese economy growth. The followings are several factors affecting antimony market. 1. China will continue strengthen the macro management for antimony industry development. MLR will continue to control total mining quota. 2. Chinese antimony concentrate import will be cut to some extent. With newly-built antimony smelters in Tajikistan and Russia, their antimony ore resource will be digested by their own countries, which will reduce the antimony concentrate export in this two countries, and Chinese domestic antimony smelters will have supply pressure in raw material supply.

educe the antimony concentrate export in this two countries, and Chinese domestic antimony smelters will have supply pressure in raw material supply. Seen from the current situation, the above influence won’t be obvious in H1 2013. 3. Antimony smelting capacity got policy expansion and fight for raw material becomes more and more furious. In recent years, the domestic antimony mine and smelters have experienced several rounds shutting down and reorganization process. The antimony enterprises in Lengshuijiang City, Hunan Province saw the obvious change. 4. In recent years, the demand growth for antimony in developed countries was almost in stagnancy. The further consumption growth will mainly concentrate in domestic market. However, Chinese antimony consumption newly added fields have not formed already, so market application expansion space was limited. Chinese antimony industry’s advantages in resource and production are difficult to be discovered. 5. In recent two year, the antimony price was in high level. It has become the motivation for overseas antimony resource to be further developed.

ed. 5. In recent two year, the antimony price was in high level. It has become the motivation for overseas antimony resource to be further developed. The global antimony products supply structure will be changed, and down-stream consumers face more choices, so domestic antimony products’ competition advantage will be threaded. Seen from all above factors, Antaike believes that the future antimony price will affected by Chinese antimony supply level, and Chinese market will become a leading factor. Due to oversupply and high output, Chinese antimony resource’s advantage position will suffered larger and large threat. Currently, China is facing more serious short supply of antimony concentrate and depending more on overseas antimony concentrate. Antaike forecasts that antimony market in 2013 will experience a slow resuming process in 2013. The general market may operate in fluctuation trend, and the general price may go up. In H1 2013, the market is predicted to be in resuming period and domestic antimony price won’t see large fluctuated scale. The antimony market is likely to escape weak situation in H2, which will depend on global economy’s improvement.

Minor Metals Monthly No.154 Website: www.antaike.com 11 In 2013, the domestic antimony ingot price is predicted to be in the range of 75,000-78,000yuan/t, while the global antimony price is for cased to be in the range of US$12,000-12,500/t. Cobalt Market Overview 2012 Chinese Cobalt Market Review and 2013 Outlook Chinese cobalt price follows global tendency In 2012, Chinese cobalt price followed global tendency as a whole but it also had its own characteristics. When global cobalt price increased, Chinese cobalt price increased slightly behind due to serious oversupply; when global price plunged to lows, Chinese cobalt price showed better falling resistance performance than global price due to high raw material cost, especially, when global price made new lows continuously since Oct., 2012, Chinese cobalt price was relatively stable. Average domestic cobalt price on Changjiang Spot Market was 230,600yuan/t in 2012, down by 20.65% y-o-y.

Chinese cobalt price was relatively stable. Average domestic cobalt price on Changjiang Spot Market was 230,600yuan/t in 2012, down by 20.65% y-o-y. Average Quotation of Cobalt on Chinese Spot Market Changjiang (yuan/t) 2004 440,300-464,300 2005 334,100-351,100 2006 323,400-356,000 2007 521,500-540,600 2008 630,000-647,300 2009 328,800-345,300 2010 346,600-369,900 2011 281,200-299,900 2012 224,000-237,300 Source: Antaike Comparison of Chinese Cobalt Quotation

Minor Metals Monthly No.154 Website: www.antaike.com 12 Source：Antaike Chinese cobalt market supply decreases by 14.1% y-o-y in 2012 Cobalt raw material import was 25,681t in Jan.-Nov., 2012, down by 16.99% y-o-y, counting cobalt ores & conc. at home and cobalt from imported nickel raw material, primary cobalt output is expected to be 30.7kt in 2012. Adding imported and recycled cobalt metal content, total cobalt supply will be about 36.8kt in 2012, down by 14.1% compared with 42.8kt in 2011. China Cobalt Supply Condition 2012 Source：Antaike In respect of imported raw material, domestic smelters adhered to import cobalt wet-processing metallurgy and alliage blanc, thus import increased dramatically, especially, cobalt wet-processing metallurgy has become the largest domestic source of cobalt raw material, while cobalt ores & conc. decreased. Chinese cobalt price maintained low in 2012, many cobalt smelters stayed in loss operation and had to stop or reduce production, some of them choose mergers and acquisitions. So far Chinese cobalt refining capacity was 50-60kt, showing a serious surplus.

p or reduce production, some of them choose mergers and acquisitions. So far Chinese cobalt refining capacity was 50-60kt, showing a serious surplus. Shares taking or buying is good for investors to enter cobalt industry or expand capacity, also benefiting to sound development of Chinese cobalt industry.

ring alloy and spherical nickel accounts for 84.91%, 9.25 and 5.89% of all. Cobalt Consumption in Chinese Battery Field 2012 Source：Antaike From Jan. to Nov., 2012, Chinese lithium battery output reached 3.82bln units and total output in 2012 is expected to be 4bln units, up by 33% y-o-y. Lithium battery consumption in traditional fields such as laptop, digital camera and mobile phone increased slowly. In the first eleven

Minor Metals Monthly No.154 Website: www.antaike.com 13 Chinese cobalt consumption ups by 8.5% y-o-y in 2012 Growth rate of Chinese economy slowed down in 2012, weak overseas demand affected domestic cobalt consumption by varying degrees. According to preliminary data, Chinese cobalt consumption reached 31.7kt in 2012, up by 8.5% y-o-y, of which, proportion of battery, cemented carbide, magnetic material, glass ceramic, catalyst and high temperature alloy is 67%, 7%, 6%, 5%, 4% and 3%, respectively. Affected by slow domestic economy, output of cemented carbide and high temperature alloy sharply decreased, cobalt consumption decreased correspondingly. China Cobalt Consumption Condition 2012 Source：Antaike Cobalt consumption in battery field reaches 21.2kt Cobalt consumption in battery field reached 21.2kt in 2012, up by 12.41% y-o-y, of which, proportion of lithium cobalt oxide, Ni-Co-Mn ternary material, hydrogen storing alloy and spherical nickel accounts for 84.91%, 9.25 and 5.89% of all. Cobalt Consumption in Chinese Battery Field 2012 Source：Antaike From Jan.

Minor Metals Monthly No.154 Website: www.antaike.com 14 months of 2012, laptop output was 225mln units, up by 8.73% y-o-y; digital camera output was 6,649 units, down by 4.63% y-o-y; mo bile phone output was 1.045bln units, down by 1.09% y-o-y. According to the statistics issued by Ministry of Industry and Information Technology of the People’s Republic of China on Dec. 24, net increase of Chinese telephone users reached 7.833mln and total users has reached 1.38bln, of which, mobile phone users reached 1.104bln. With the rapid development of smart phone, output of traditional mobile phone decreased. China Main Lithium Battery Consumption Fields Output in 2008-2012 Unit 2008 2009 2010 2011 2012（1-11） Mobile phone bln 0.64 0.726 0.998 1.143 1.045 Laptop mln 108.59 150.72 234.25 244.08 224.55 Digital camera mln 81.88 80.26 91.29 80.49 66.49 Source: China Monthly Economic Indicators Although lithium battery application in large-scale stored energy and electric mobile was still limited in 2012, it owned broad prospect. Premier Wen Jiabao chaired the executive meeting of the State Council on Apr.

and electric mobile was still limited in 2012, it owned broad prospect. Premier Wen Jiabao chaired the executive meeting of the State Council on Apr. 18, 2012, which discussed to pass “Plans for Energy Saving and New Energy Auto Industry (2012-2020)”. At this meeting, Chinese government confirmed pure electric as major strategy direction of auto industry reconstruction and currently the government paid more attention to improve industrialization of pure electric cars and plug-in hybrid, popularized no plug-in hybrid, energy saving internal combustion engine cars and lifted the technology level of Chinese auto industry. By 2015, sales of pure electric cars and plug-in hybrid is expected to reach 0.5mln units and the number will exceed 5mln in 2020; average fuel consumption of passenger cars will decrease to 6.9 liters per 100km in 2015 and 5.0 liters per 100km in 2020; technology of new energy cars, electric battery and key parts basically catches up with international advanced level. This plan has a guiding significance to R & D and production of relevant battery material.

ts basically catches up with international advanced level. This plan has a guiding significance to R & D and production of relevant battery material. Cobalt consumption in cemented carbide decreases by 11.7% According to the statistics from Cemented Carbide Branch of China Tungsten Association, Chinese cemented carbide output was about 16kt in Q1-Q3, 2012, down by 10% y-o-y. Output of hard facing material and cemented carbide mixture fell by varying degrees. Cobalt consumption demand in cemented carbide was tolerable in Q1 and Q2, but the market demand rapidly worsened and operation rate seriously decreased since Q3. Chinese cemented carbide output in 2012 is expected to reach 20-21kt, however output in 2011 was 23.5kt, thus cobalt consumption in that field decreased and cobalt consumption would be about 2,400t. Cobalt consumption in other fields keeps stable Cobalt consumption in magnetic material and glass ceramic fields maintained stable; of which, glass ceramic field was seriously affected by foreign trade protectionism policy, EU, Brazil and

Minor Metals Monthly No.154 Website: www.antaike.com 15 Argentina all imposed punitive tax to ceramic made by China. As catalyst expanded more than 10Mt PTA capacity, cobalt consumption would hopefully increase. Output of high temperature alloy and high speed steel tool decreased, according to incomplete statistics, output of high temperature alloy and high speed steel tool was 7,739t and 71,991t in Jan.-Nov., 2012, down by 11.83% y-o-y and 19.96% y-o-y, respectively. Import Import of domestic cobalt ores & conc. was 9,990t in Jan.-Nov., 2012, down by 47.62% y-o-y; import of intermediate products of cobalt wet-processing metallurgy was 13,714t, up by 32.27% y-o-y; import of alliage blanc was about 1,977t, up by 31.98% y-o-y. Main raw material import by customs is concentrated in Jiangsu, Zhejiang, Jiangxi and Guangxi etc. Cobalt Raw Material Import by Customs in Jan.-Nov., 2012 Unit: t Area Cobalt ores & conc.

concentrated in Jiangsu, Zhejiang, Jiangxi and Guangxi etc. Cobalt Raw Material Import by Customs in Jan.-Nov., 2012 Unit: t Area Cobalt ores & conc. Intermediate products of cobalt wet-processing metallurgy Beijing 21,290 5,648 Liaoning 204 88 Shanghai 4,817 145 Jiangsu 29,862 9,388 Zhejiang 61,698 3,613 Anhui 3,912 792 Fujian 62 — Jiangxi 15,975 11,460 Shandong 6,809 292 Hubei 2,016 9,178 Hunan 2,387 2,724 Guangdong 11,670 13,944 Guangxi 59 — Gansu 4,414 10,960 Ningxia 1,316 — Yunnan — 31 Total 16,6491 68,263 Source: the Customs Import of refined cobalt reached 2,068t in Jan.-Nov., 2012; import of cobalt salt reached 811t; annual refined cobalt import in 2012 is expected to reach 2,200t, down by 18.61% y-o-y, mainly due to oversupply market; import of cobalt salt was 900t, up by 165% y-o-y, so from the view of import data, main imported cobalt salt was cobalt dioxide and cobalt tetroxide. Export So far 20% Chinese lithium cobalt oxide is used in export. In the first eleven months of 2012, Chinese lithium cobalt oxide export reached 6,322t (4,524t in 2011), total export in 2012 is expected to be about 6,900t. Nowadays more and more foreign battery producers began to

Minor Metals Monthly No.154 Website: www.antaike.com 16 develop the industrial chain in China, including lithium cobalt oxide anode material, ternary precursor and other upstream products. According to the understanding from Antaike, most foreign battery enterprises enter into Chinese market through acquisition and shares participation of domestic cobalt smelters, such as SK Group purchased shares of Zhejiang Elite Cobalt & Nickel Material Co., Ltd and produced ternary precursor. Refined cobalt export reached 3,019t in Jan.-Nov., 2012, up by 12.33% y-o-y; cobalt powder export was 508t, down by 9.93% y-o-y; cobalt salt export reached 5,057t, up by 39.7% y-o-y. Of which, cobalt tetroxide export was 3,770t, up by 68.08% y-o-y. Export of refined cobalt and cobalt powder in 2012 will reach 3,800t, up by 7.28% y-o-y; cobalt salt export will reach 5,600t, up by 42.28% y-o-y. The major reasons for increasing export were high export expectation for domestic smelters and short payment for foreign customers.

Minor Metals Monthly No.154 Website: www.antaike.com 17 commodity demand will also slow down but never stop. Aluminum, nickel, cobalt and lead consumption benefit from structure transition and income increase, while copper, iron-steel and zinc demand will decrease. In conclusion, cobalt consumption has little relevance to macro-control and downturn economy but benefits from consumption upgrading. Chinese cobalt price will mainly follow global market in 2013 and fluctuate at 200,000-240,000yuan/t. Indium Market Overview The global economic revival slowed down in 2012. The Chinese whole nonferrous metals industry experienced a hard time in the year including indium sector. In the year, the indium export declined to a new low record among recent decade, and China became a net importer from net exporter. Besides, investment demand supported the domestic indium price, and the government’s reserve movement lifted the market confident. Price review The domestic refined indium quotation was RMB 3,450-3,550/kg at the beginning of 2012, which closed at RMB 3,400-3,480/kg by the end of the year, down by RMB 60/kg or 1.7%.

Chinese consuming cobalt inventory exceeds 9,000t in 2012 From the above, Chinese raw material import decreased in 2012 but cobalt consumption in terminal fields still increased, in order to satisfy with consumption demand, domestic cobalt smelters started to consume accumulated inventory during the past several years, Chinese consuming cobalt inventory will exceed 9,000t in 2012. Mergers and acquisitions in domestic cobalt industry will stay in a substantial stage and competition will be brutal. Living environment of some small-scale smelters will be worse. dium quotation was RMB 3,450-3,550/kg at the beginning of 2012, which closed at RMB 3,400-3,480/kg by the end of the year, down by RMB 60/kg or 1.7%. The annual average quotation was RMB 3,524.3/kg in 2012, down by 21.76% compared with RMB 4,504.6/kg in 2011. The high record in 2012 appeared in February, which touched RMB 3,750-3,850/kg, while the low record was RMB 3,300-3,400/kg in June. The crude indium quotation was RMB 3,150-3,250/kg at the beginning of 2012, and closed at RMB 3,100-3,180/kg at the end year, down by RMB 60/kg or 1.9%. The annual average quotation was RMB 3,181.9/kg, down by 21.4% y-o-y. The quotation touched a high at RMB 3,500-3,600/kg in February and a low of RMB 3,000-3,100/kg in June. The refined indium FOB quotation was US$ 580-610/kg at the beginning of 2012, which was the highest record in the year. The quotation was US$ 470-510/kg at the end of 2012, down by US$ 105/kg or 17.6% during the year. The annual average quotation was US$ 540.5/kg in 2012, down by 26.2% y-o-y.

Minor Metals Monthly No.154 Website: www.antaike.com 18 Indium products quotation by Indium, Bismuth & Germanium Branch of CNIA There were two key factors affected the indium price in 2012: investment in domestic market and supply-demand relationship in international market. The indium prices in domestic and overseas markets were separated, which were searching new balance. The domestic indium price fluctuated obviously in 3 times in 2012. The first time was in February when the cadmium pollution accident happened in Hechi City of Guangxi Autonomous Region. As a result, the local 100s heavy metals related enterprises were ordered to suspend production. Hechi City is an important primary indium production region, so that the situation made the market worry about the indium supply. Then, the refined indium price increased to the yearly high record. The second time was in June when the market expected Chinese govt. to reserve indium within the month, which pushed up the indium price out of the bottom. The third time was before Christmas when users purchased indium for preparing raw material. Meanwhile, the China govt. decided to reserve indium.

om. The third time was before Christmas when users purchased indium for preparing raw material. Meanwhile, the China govt. decided to reserve indium. The two factors pushed up the price jointly. The FOB quotation is offered by Chinese exporters, which is mainly in accordance with international indium price and different with domestic price obviously. The weak global indium demand reduced the role of Chinese supply, so that there was not too much reflect on Chinese environmental protection regulation in Jan.-Aug. In September, the demand rebounded due to the information about Chinese indium reserves, and the orders increased more or less. After the advantage was offset, the market became silence again. Indium supply and demand Chinese indium output increases by 7% The Indium, Bismuth and Germanium Branch of CNIA is collecting production data for 2012. Nearly 80% member enterprises had submitted their indium output data, respectively, the amount of which was close to the national total output in 2011. So, it is estimated the Chinese indium output in 2012 increased by about 7% y-o-y.

he amount of which was close to the national total output in 2011. So, it is estimated the Chinese indium output in 2012 increased by about 7% y-o-y. The indium production in Hechi City of Guangxi declined under the influence of cadmium pollution accident in 2012, while the production in other regions especially Hunan and Yunnan increased fast encouraged by the domestic investment demand. The completed production data and analysis in 2012 will be represented in the report of next month. Global indium consumption declines The indium import quantity in major using countries declined a lot in 2012. Japan imported 157 tonnes of indium in Jan.-Nov., down by 66.3% y-o-y; South Korea imported 89.6 tonnes in the same period, down by 35.3%; the United States imported 93.4 tonnes in Jan.-Oct., down by 25.2%. The ITO manufacturers in foreign countries were in low operation rate at less than 70% in 2012, which became less depending on Chinese indium supply as they did in recent years. The statistics released by China Customs show that China exported accumulative 4,598 kg of indium in Jan.-Nov., down by 95.2% y-o-y.

in recent years. The statistics released by China Customs show that China exported accumulative 4,598 kg of indium in Jan.-Nov., down by 95.2% y-o-y. It is estimated that Chinese indium import was 19 tonnes, while the export was 5 tonnes in 2012. As one of the global key primary indium exporting counties, China created a low record in indium export within the recent decade.

Minor Metals Monthly No.154 Website: www.antaike.com 19 Chinese Indium export in 2003-2012 Supply-demand balance The net import of indium was about 14 tonnes in 2012, and the domestic consumption was about 60 tonnes. Therefore, there was over 85% of newly produced indium in the year became stocks. About 100 tonnes was reserved by the government, and the 1/3 of rest was held by producers; 1/3 was held by individuals; the rest 1/3 was held by investors. Outlook The high domestic indium inventory will influence the producing activities of producers. However, the raw material of indium will be relative rich. According to Antaike’s forecast, the Chinese refined zinc output will be 5.2 Mt in 2013, up by 7.4% y-o-y. As a by-product of zinc, indium output will be in uptrend accordingly. The enterprises with annual indium output more than 20 tonnes are in normal production at present. So, we forecasts the Chinese indium output will increase in a range in 2013. China will keep developing TFT-LCD technology in the coming year. The Development and Reform Commission will encourage enterprises to lift investment in R & D, and guide the industrial regulation in the next 3-5 years.

Minor Metals Monthly No.154 Website: www.antaike.com 20 Hsikwangshan's smelting plant to realize no waste water discharge It is reported that Hsikwangshan Twinkling Star Company (Hsikwangshan) is busy on installing equipments of waste water recycling system equipment installment recently. Related staff of the company said that the equipment will be installed completely by the end of December and put into trial running when the system runs successfuly-no waste water will be discharged in antimony smelting process. The system is the company’s important environment protection project which is designed to have treating capacity of 600tpd waste water. After being put into operation, the system could also pump waste water from the nearby place of the plant to treat it and use it for production. This will play a large role in relieving water shortage pressure on the plant. In addition, the company also said that the plant’s arsenic residue workshop finished the yearly production plan in advance. Up to the end of Nov. 25, the workshop has treated 1,264t arsenic residue, recycled 220t antimony as well, representing 104% of the yearly plan.

The investing demand will decline in 2013, which will be an uncertainty for indium price. Meanwhile, the high stocks and smuggle makes the indium price hard to increase. Vanadium Shaanxi Wuzhou’s 2ktpy VN project commissioned It is reported that Shaanxi Wuzhou Mining Co., Ltd (Shaanxi Wuzhou)’s 2ktpy VN energy-saving and technology-improvement project has consumed 70% of the total investment. The project’s two sets pusher kilns were put into operation at the end of Dec. 2012. The project was started in Sept. 2012. Shaanxi Wuzhou is a subsidiary of Shaanxi Non-ferrous Metals Holding Group. Ferroalloy The first project of waste heat power generation with waste heat from ferroalloy production in operation It is reported that a 4.5MW powder generation project by using waste heat flame and gas from ferroalloy production was put into operation recently in Zhi Zuishan City of Ningxia Province. The total investment in the project is 50mln yuan. After being completed, it could generate 33.75mln KWH electricity per year and save 11ktpy coal equivalent consumption and reduce 27KL CO2 emission. Lithium Do-fluoride Chemicals occupies 30% domestic supply market of lithium hexafluorophosphate Do-fluoride Chemicals Co., Ltd (Do-fluoride Chemicals, SZ:002407) said that after one year marketing, the company’s lithium hexafluorophosphate had already occupied 30% market share of domestic advanced lithium ion battery raw material, and it also was exported to Japan and South Korea markets. Up to now, Do-fluoride Chemicals has already owned 1,200tpy capacity of lithium hexafluorophosphate. After the second stage of 2ktpy lithium hexafluorophosphate project being commissioned in H1, 2013, the company will have 2,200tpy capacity of it, accounting for 50% of total domestic demand. However, the output of it in 2013 is predicted to be more than 1,500t. Based in Henan Province, the company is engaged in producing chemicals.
